intro.heroSubtitle: 2Gather brings prayer, Scripture, and encouragement into one warm space — real-time prayer chat, a themed Bible verse for each day, and modes for whatever you're walking through.
intro.previewVerseText: Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.
intro.previewMsgIn: Resting after a long week 🙏 could you pray for some peace?
intro.previewMsgPrayer: Lord, quiet their mind and restore their strength. Give them true rest. Amen.
intro.featuresTitle: Everything you need to pray together
intro.featuresSubtitle: Warm, reverent, and built for real life — in your language and theirs.
intro.feature1Desc: Share a request and pray together the moment it matters — send a prayer, not just a message.
intro.feature2Desc: A curated, attributed Bible verse each day (World English Bible), themed to what you're carrying.
intro.feature3Desc: Travel, Interview, Pitch, Promotion, Recovery — each reshapes your verses, prayers, and gentle nudges.
intro.step1Body: Sign up, set your name, and choose a mode for whatever you're walking through.
intro.step2Body: Send prayers and Scripture in a warm, focused chat — together, even when you're apart.
intro.step3Body: Save what speaks to you in your journal, and get a gentle daily verse nudge.
intro.ctaSubtitle: Join 2Gather and bring faith, friends, and Scripture into one place.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue praying together.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join 2Gather and start praying together.
register.errPasswordRule: At least 6 chars, one upper, one lower.
register.accountCreated: Account created. Let's set up your profile…

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sentTo: We've sent a password reset link to
forgot.resetSent: Reset link sent — check your inbox.
forgot.resetFailed: Could not send reset email. Please try again.

chatRoom.selectTitle: Select a chat to start messaging
chatRoom.selectBody: Choose a conversation from the sidebar, or search for a contact to begin a new multilingual conversation.

settings.emailHint: Managed by your sign-in; can't be edited here.
settings.languageHint: Messages others send you are translated into this language. New messages use it right away.
